title: R package development
code: # To run code Rscript -e "devtools::load_all(); code"  # To run all tests Rscript -e "devtools::test()"  # To run all tests for files starting with {name} Rscript -e "devtools::test(filter = '^{name}')"  # To run all tests for R/{name}.R Rscript -e "devtools::test_active_file('R/{name}.R')"  # To run a single test "blah" for R/{name}.R Rscript -e "devtools::test_active_file('R/{name}.R', desc = 'blah')"  # To redocument the package Rscript -e "devtools::document()"  # To check pkgdown documentation Rscript -e "pkgdown::check_pkgdown()"  # To check the package with R CMD check Rscript -e "devtools::check()"

title: R package development
text: Always use = assignment, never <-. 2-space indentation, 120-character line limit. snake_case functions variables, CamelCase R6 classes. calling function imported package foo write foo::bar() bar() Double quotes strings, explicit TRUE/FALSE (never T/F), explicit 1L integers. Use implicit return values functions. Prefer result = (...) ... else ... (...) { result = ... } else { result = ... } difference branches assigned value. User-facing API (exported functions, public R6 methods) must checkmate assert_*() argument checks. internal code, match existing level defensiveness. Use mlr3misc utilities appropriate: map(), map_chr(), invoke(), calculate_hash(), str_collapse(), %nin%, %??%. implementing something, read similar existing files first match established patterns. Always use #nolint next disable linters next line instead # nolint line.

title: R package development
text: Name file important contained function / class whitespaces, special chart filenames Usually one large function / class, per file, adding multiple smaller helpers ok

title: R package development
text: Derived classes must declare #' @include ParentClass.R roxygen header. controls Collate: field DESCRIPTION base classes load derived classes.

title: R package development
text: Use checkmate arg-checks Use data.table efficient table structures OOP-stype use R6 Use cli format messages, warnings, errors prints

title: R package development
text: Tests R/{name}.R go tests/testthat/test_{name}.R. new code accompanying test. existing tests, place new tests next similar existing tests. Strive keep tests minimal comments. full test suite takes long time. run tests relevant changes devtools::test(filter = '^{name}').

title: R package development
text: Every user-facing function exported roxygen2 documentation. Wrap roxygen comments 120 characters. Write one sentence per line. sentence exceeds limit, break comma, “”, “”, “”, appropriate point. Internal functions roxygen documentation. Always re-document package changing roxygen2 comment. Don’t hand-edit generated artifacts: man/, NAMESPACE. Roxygen templates live man-roxygen/ Bibliographic references go R/bibentries.R cited `r format_bib("key")`.

title: R package development
text: Every user-facing change given bullet NEWS.md. add bullets small documentation changes internal refactorings. bullet briefly describe change end user mention related issue parentheses. bullet can consist multiple sentences contain new lines (.e. line wrap). change related function, put name function early bullet. Order bullets alphabetically function name. Put bullets don’t mention function names beginning.

title: R package development
text: use gh retrieve information issue, always use --comments read comments.

title: R package development
text: following applies natural language text, docs, commments, NEWS, etc, code Use American english Use Oxford comma capitalize normal nouns method names. “Bayesian” capitalized, “random forest” . Use cspell check typos, add needed words .cspell/project-words.txt reasonable

title: R package development
text: Read respect files .agents folder
